title: scutellaria pilosa var. ovalifolia
intro: Scutellaria pilosa var. ovalifolia is a variety of the Scutellaria pilosa plant, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is commonly known as Baikal skullcap or Chinese skullcap. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Scutellaria pilosa var. ovalifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit neuroprotective effects, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as Alzheimer's disease and Parkinson's disease. Scutellaria pilosa var. ovalifolia is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the dried roots or leaves in hot water or by extracting the active compounds with a solvent.
